title: Idea-to-Plan Eval Contract
description: Frozen per-case contract that Tier 1 checks run against. Authored once per eval input, human-reviewed, then versioned.

requirements.description: Features/capabilities that MUST appear in the design output

term.description: Short searchable term (used for extraction matching)

match_patterns.description: Regex patterns that indicate this requirement is covered in output

non_goals.description: Features that must NOT appear as included capabilities in the design

leak_patterns.description: Regex patterns that indicate this non-goal leaked INTO the design as an included feature

safe_patterns.description: Regex patterns where the term appearing is OK (e.g., inside a Non-Goals section)

deferred.description: Items explicitly deferred to later versions

required.description: Stack items that must appear in the design

forbidden.description: Stack items that must NOT appear (e.g., competing frameworks)

allow_justified_deviation.description: If true, a deviation flagged with explicit rationale is a WARN not FAIL

limits.description: Numeric constraints that must be respected in the design

match_pattern.description: Regex to find where this limit is declared in output

required_files.description: Glob patterns for files that must exist after a successful run

required_sections.description: Map of file glob -> list of section headings that must appear
